title: Make It Your Own
goal: Change the words inside a Do block so the cat says what YOU want.

steps.prompt: Drag a Do block into the workspace.
Click the text inside the Do block.

canned_hints: The text inside the block is what the cat says.
You can type any letters you want.
Try adding a second Do block with a different word!

success_check.message_missing: Drag a Do block and change the words!
